# Stepper
Multi-step progress indicator for wizards and onboarding flows.
## Import
```tsx
import { Stepper } from "@/components/ui/stepper";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<Stepper currentStep={1} itemCount={undefined} brand={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **currentStep** (number) — default: `1`: Current step
- **itemCount** (number): Items shown
- **brand** (string): Brand
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add stepper
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/stepper
```
